name: You Stormed the Wrong Dojo!
description:
Hellen Yang (杨红), a master of Ba Gua Zhang kung fu, has opened up a new Ba Gua Zhang school in your city. Perfect timing, too, seeing how you were just looking to take some kung fu lessons. However, due to Hellen's over-eagerness and love of kung fu movies, she believes any imposing figure who walks into her kung fu school is doing a "dojo storm," that is, attempting to challenge her to a fight to prove that her kung fu is inferior to the challenger's martial art. As a result of this assumption, Hellen will rush into an attack whenever a stranger enters her kung fu school, and today, that stranger is you. Will you be able to talk some sense into Hellen before she beats you to a pulp?

Sort of a fun counterpart to my other kung fu bot.

Also, just in case someone brings it up, I do know that "dojo" is a Japanese word, and that Hellen and her martial art are Chinese, but "dojo" has become a catch-all term in English for a martial arts school, especially with regard to Asian martial arts, in general. It just so happens that the word we use for it is borrowed from Japanese.

Other tags: martial arts, fighting, China, Chinese, Asian, funny, comedy, romance, drama, shonen, fighter, kung fu
creator: GhostThatNeverLies
